h4eeb4acbg97c7g4989gbccbg8b63e6950f7a: I already met your friend. You here to get me out of here?
h6f4dfe70g3d5fg48e9g870bg8a108ce226cb: Wotcher messin' with my cage for?
h2b2ec3bdg3eb6g4ae4gb7d7gb45937922f46: Didn't expect to see a drow in here. Did the boss lady send you to rescue me?
h574cc125g2862g4820g8900g164314df771f: Another drow - she's one of my best mates. Thought you might work for her.
h05eea966g87d2g4782g93f8g9b9b1c3cc97c: Get me outta here, and I'll take you to meet her and the rest of my tribe.
h36681db6g1b45g431agb8f2g0604938f62c1: You're not mates with the teefs are you? You need to get back to your own people before you go soft.
h36bb157bg4700g4ac5g842fge3bcabc38aa5: The lady that sent me here's the cruellest drow I ever met. You could learn a thing or two from her.
h124dcb1bga36dg4d21g9357gfaf2abf2e99e: Yes, she sent me. Ready to get out of here?
h3acd7e0cg53feg457bg9b33gccd8ac98ada6: Yeah. Take me back to the tribe, and we'll tell the boss all about this pretty little place so she can burn it to the ground.
h213bd682gff61g4eacgbbfdg08394dfc2600: We'll be heroes, blessed by priestess Gut in the name of the Absolute.
hbabc2dafgb79eg42e5g96dagedfc9ff45e4f: Don't believe you. There's something a bit soft about you.
he8756feeg7d83g4e25gbc9ag23040a55156e: Don't believe you. You ain't got enough scars to be one of her playthings.
hbf77818fg2379g4b3fgad12ga3b87b9b1114: Yes, she sent me. Ready to get out of here?
h1431a13dg2d5fg4dc8gaf02gcbdb99a4a116: Yer a long way from 'ome, ain't ya underdwarf?
h9f332716g6119g451eg82cfg02c2d58553f2: Get me outta 'ere, an' I'll introduce you to my tribe. You'd like 'em.
hb60b65cbg4ae3g4ffdg8b0agb0eeced235a9: All right. I'll see what I can do.
h0d166853g4d32g4c6dg8803g912c71a701e8: Well, if you make it worth my while...
h8b3bca08g7a70g4edeg98b1g2b51a9fef15f: Goblins belong in cages. You won't be getting my help.
h5d2986e9ge9d0g467fga2c7g43c1f1f9948e: Aw, c'mon. We could be mates.
h701442aeg5c4ag4196g9935g7fcac95f84ac: Patience. I'll get you out soon.
h5d73849bg56c5g44fdgab42g8267f71c5990: I been patient. So hurry it up, yeah?
hd4df1065ge7c6g400cg8850g480d7a83fb9f: What could a tribe of goblins possibly offer me?
h89ffbdedg3b0ag41d1ga280gd022e1938b38: The power of the Absolute, of course! Priestess Gut will tell you all about it, and make sure you have everything you need.
hd9c7e104gaf0cg45f7gaad5g696f3e676123: The Absolute is gold from the sky, she is. The blessin' in the storm an' the storm itself.
h7bfd70a9g774bg415cgb1cfg145d3afd2ff6: We're burnin'  her name across the face o' the world, we are.
h871964d0gf1e9g4312ga129g1a8c6b26875a: Priestess Gut is quite the name. Tell me more.
h056e8b4fga34cg480ag983eg96023cfd2a21: Got a whole lab set up. Cooks up potions that fix our lads no matter how much of a beatin' they take.
h16f85042g4d06g4359ga83eg9ef84b8ba224: Could probably stick yer head back on if someone woz to chop it off. Mighty booyahg.
hadd9a2e7gcf93g4040gba6ag8fa8fa669c44: Didn't expect to see a drow in here. Did the boss lady send you to rescue me?
h44887efagbdc2g4e47gbf32g50fec970efaf: Yer a long way from 'ome, ain't ya underdwarf?
h7625ca9ag7236g4220g98a7g96984acd816d: Ain't sure why ya killed yer own to protect me. Don't care, neither.
h42fed88ag13e7g4962gad3fge2ad2e81f682: Ain't sure why ya killed that soft-arse to protect me. Don't care, neither.
hec278d74g3bc2g4312g832agd0782b950eff: It's too late to make friends, worgmeat. My tribe's comin'.
hdabfcdabgd7e6g43f7g9612gcab4fbd07639: They're gonna burn this pretty place for the glory of the Absolute and 'ang ya by yer guts.
hb7cb5d40g66f3g4303gb786g56400a6e205c: I just saved your life. Show some gratitude.
h1d5c7c11g8878g4c44gb7d0ga231d7fe4692: They'll peel yer face off and nail it to a wall!
h57ae1bcegb3a5g4cb9gbc59ga03569fbea36: I ain't scared of some guard. Stick a dozen arrows in me, and Priestess Gut'd still patch me up.
hd1914f57ge824g4e11gbb6dg5001383bdf23: Do I look like I'm scared of goblins? I'll smash 'em, like the last lot I ran into.
h4bcd479fg0379g44a2gb7eeg44473c3bd4b0: They can try, but they won't be the first goblins I've killed today.
h3fc8eb14g975ag4616gb4b5ga317bf01fd4b: We got more than ya can handle. And our priestess keeps us fightin' even if someone sticks a few holes in us.
h5a4bb3d6gd9e8g49e0g8612gd99955db4c38: The Absolute? If that's your god, I don't know them.
h4253c9edga3b1g4c2bg81d8g71514e6e12c6: In all my studies, I've seen no reference to a god called the Absolute.
h200bd038g052cg4febgbe93g8d6cdf7d1c2e: Another god? I swear, Toril has more deities than there are stars in the sky.
ha6c42029g02e6g4affgb040gf69a9bb24f05: Who is this Absolute you're so fond of? Your god?
h5f2f7c1dgab37g4b9ag9d60g0acb441cc9e4: We're burnin' Her name across the face o' the world, we are.
h188304dbg645fg4073g80b6g022b0697f21e: The Absolute is gold from the sky, She is. The blessin' in the storm an' the storm itself.
hd4b5bc88ga4e9g4986gbdc6g8f467db700eb: You've caught my interest. Have any holy literature on you?
h8dbb932cge319g4b9bg8c2bgbee390f60716: My tribe can tell you everythin' there is to know. Absolute blessed one of our own - Priestess Gut.
h740d7f44g56b6g401fgbef6gf68c588838e3: 'The smartest goblin in the world', hm? Faint praise, indeed.
h19c3cf06g4e2fg4ae9g8bc7g36ec4376e1cf: Well, I'd certainly like to meet her.
h947f02e3gff8eg4c61g9a13ga1543be2ef01: Get me out of here and I'll tell you where to find her. Deal?
h266b0e8dgbad7g46b1g9dd9gd3048316dfd8: Deal. I'll get you out of there.
h848828b5g0088g4431g8978g5c2c9b45dd08: Then hurry up an' do it. My tribe ain't as friendly as I am.
h6c004a1cg495bg4e4eg817fgbdd413cd209f: You already told me what I need to know. I'll find the priestess myself.
h35876dcag2b73g4378gb409g1d7dc0d85107: Ha! Even if you did find my tribe, they'd set the worgs on ya.
h937717cbgacaeg4959g80aagaeaa20521869: You need me - get me outta here, and I'll tell 'em what a good friend you are.
h4f5bfb53g6b26g4b2fg8161gad6de8ca4d61: Not a chance. You can rot in that cage.
h61ce6597gcd30g469ega943g538c79dfb6a2: Suit yerself. Lookin' forward to seein' wot yer innards look like.
h0d85a27fge658g4df3gb4e8g005277d938fa: Just be patient. I'll break you free soon enough.
hb67f04dagc2e7g4a6ag9653g4615e6cdd912: Well, 'urry up. I got all the time in the world. You don't.
hbf080646g9c76g4a35g9442g471726f242b8: Sounds like tall tales to me.
hda6b2aadg5162g410dgac8agdbda57adb35d: Nice story. Buy it for a copper in a tavern nearby?
hf88da3ebg2375g4996gb9d1gdb777ef571f1: It's the truth - I swear on your mother's grave.
h303d2ca7g7681g4058ga974g3d0a68e93074: A goblin healer. We really are desperate, aren't we?
h7db1b348g8465g4151ga544g84ebc7f9dd4d: I wonder how she feels about trepanning.
h9481ee1fg455fg4c16g90fag0f45a2dddaaf: | A goblin wise woman? Ha ha! |
h64060362g39d3g4748g8088gff06652f2913: I'm not saying we should trust a goblin, but she sounds very useful.
h35547743g5593g48e3g8b85g593ad26d78ed: | Goblins don't heal; they kill. Nope. |
hdb2b6d96g979dg4cfcg9e70g45208fa3a43d: I'd sooner swig a flask of acid than anything a goblin cooks up.
hb6d07bd7gd0d6g4477g84d0ge478882eaa49: Booyahg - the goblin word for magic. Primitive to a fault, but not entirely without merit.
h81822c28g5722g467bgb495g294f4e30a972: An all-powerful goddess that can't get you out of a cage?
ha41b10c5gb036g43dfgbdeeg4d112a7a4d6f: Maybe she sent you to help me. An' ya will, if ya wanna save yer skin.
h814e192eg1e62g4053gb7e3g39b93a1828fa: And if the tiefs stick a few arrows in us on the way out of here, don't worry. Priestess Gut'll patch us up.
he8103271ga2f5g4856g9b10g082b4deed4b7: They're gonna burn this pretty place for the glory of the Absolute and 'ang ya by yer guts.
hb6f8e634g9df0g4322gaf46g32a31eb41bd8: Ah, the 'Absolute'. This is the deity you're all bowing to?
h1cd3fff9g3a85g45adg9ab1g7f34b3a93490: The Absolute? That's one god I don't know.
hbe3be472g78e0g4d51g8e89g5ffadc0dc221: The Absolute? I've seen no mention of Her in my studies.
hf5afdda8g56a7g44fagba08gafcc2ab5a97e: Another god? I swear, Toril has more deities than there are stars in the sky.
h72454417g0672g4172g8ea1g98cfd3380ac4: The Absolute? Can't say I know your god.
he51318b4g31e2g47d6g82e2g7435b1b61e6f: No point turnin' on yer own if yer just gonna give 'em a little tap.
ha7abf75bg2aacg459dg977fgfe4680ef8bc5: Ain't sure why ya protected me. Don't care, neither.
h02781cb1g8e27g4e44ga5afg1cb9ffe0c52b: You gonna open this cage or wot?
h16a2efc3gf83cg4788gbdc3gd36c0d0c8c2a: Oh, look - one of ya found the stones to talk to me rather than cryin' an' moanin' about yer dead mates.
h52361d62g4845g4566g8927gd4d9b4977350: Runnin' out of time, worgmeat. My family'll be 'ere soon. Lemme out.
h013a3efdge7e5g430dga479gad5be1c044cd: We're runnin' out of time. They're gonna murder me!
